meta.title: scene animation demo — per-node image transform + glow
meta.notes: Self-demo for the BIG ANIMATION WISHLIST enablers (docs/LAYOUT_ENGINE.md): the scene `image` node now carries a per-node transform (tx/ty/sc/scx/scy/rot) + glow, drawn via AddImageQuad. Three clips: widgets.reveal (inertial slide + straighten + glow bloom), widgets.cardflip (2D flip, face swap at edge-on), and a raw transformed+glowing image. Scrub to see the motion. Render a frame: build/slopstudio.exe examples/scene-anim.slop.json --shot-frame out.png --time 0.5

params.script:
local t, d = ...
return widgets.reveal(t, d)

local t, d = ...
return widgets.cardflip(t, d)
